description: This file defines a Java entity class `LoanApplicationDraft` that models a loan application draft with persistence annotations, fields for various properties including JSON payloads, statuses, scores, and timestamps, along with getter and setter methods.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class representing a loan application draft, supporting multi-step wizard saves with JSON payload and status tracking.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with the draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the user UUID for the draft.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload for the draft.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Returns the JSON string mapping section statuses.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the section status mapping JSON string.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current step in the draft process.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current step in the draft process.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the current status of the draft.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the status of the draft.

methods.name: getRiskScore
methods.description: Returns the auto-calculated risk score.

methods.name: setRiskScore
methods.description: Sets the risk score.

methods.name: getDecision
methods.description: Returns the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: setDecision
methods.description: Sets the decision outcome.

methods.name: getDecisionReason
methods.description: Returns the human-readable decision reason.

methods.name: setDecisionReason
methods.description: Sets the decision reason.

methods.name: getDecisionedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the decision was made.

methods.name: setDecisionedAt
methods.description: Sets the decision timestamp.

methods.name: getSubmittedAt
methods.description: Returns the submission timestamp.

methods.name: setSubmittedAt
methods.description: Sets the submission timestamp.

methods.name: getVersion
methods.description: Returns the version number for optimistic locking.

methods.name: setVersion
methods.description: Sets the version number.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the creation timestamp.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the last updated timestamp.

methods.name: setUpdatedAt
methods.description: Sets the last updated timestamp.
